description: Style Note There's nothing better than a lightweight shoe that provides loads of comfort and durability. The nike Mogan Mid 2 shoes is a powerful sneaker, with its simple style and extremely durable construction. Product Details Fabric upper with overlays for durability has a meshed and padded collar and tongue for all day comfort Has a tough Velcro strap above the tongue for added durability High ankle collar for better support to the lower leg with a lacing system for snug, customised Fit Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Nike swoosh on either sides and brand name on the collar PU midsole for lightweight cushioning and comfort Durable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for versatile traction and absolute grip Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
